chapters.title: Morning Walk
chapters.content: Daniel walked through the quiet streets of Paris early in the morning. The smell of fresh bread came from every bakery he passed.

chapters.title: The Small Café
chapters.content: He found a tiny café near the river and ordered coffee and a croissant. The waitress smiled and welcomed him in French.

chapters.title: A New Routine
chapters.content: Every morning after that, Daniel returned to the same café. It became his favorite place to write and watch the city wake up.
